title: TUG 360° Tangle-Free Retractable Dog Lead for Up to 15 kg Dogs | 5m Strong Nylon Tape/Ribbon (Small, Black)
features: Small Leash is Suitable for Dogs Under 16kg; Medium For Dogs Under 25kg; Large For Dogs Under 50kg
5 Meter Long Tape Leash With Easy-Adjust Retraction; Tangle Free 360 Degree Tape Movement
Quick Lock And Unlock Feature - Easy Roll-On and Roll-Off With Your Thumb
Super Comfortable Grip For Those Long Walks! Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handle
Note: Large Leash May Be Larger Than Expected; Please Review Dimensions Before Purchase. Leash Not Suitable For Chewing.
